verified.what: Committed-artifact lint second gate (FR-008; X1-X7, C1-C5)
KM crew scoped post-implement review (km-qc, km-synthesis, km-keyman, km-domain)
verified.result: zero P0; km-qc PASS 91/100, km-keyman APPROVE, km-synthesis PARTIAL FIT, km-domain CONCERNS->resolved; 4 P1s fixed

verified.what: P1 fixes re-verified: Latin subProfile ipa/extended priority (African orthographies), targetsDeclared regex aligned to parseKps, recognizePatterns hoisted (purity), mixed-confidence test added
verified.result: 63 tests pass; byte-identical rebuild; lint GREEN; ipa labels 225->5 extended-corrected

step_summaries_implement_note: Implementing 037 on branch 037-facet-classifiers. 036 harness landed; adding strategy-fingerprint + target-mix classifiers, US1 script tuning (Latin subProfile + 0.80 confidence threshold), facet YAMLs, fixtures, full-corpus index rebuild, lint wiring.

concerns.note: I1 HIGH: classifierId mismatch - data-model Entity 1 says classifier.id = strategy-fingerprint/target-mix and must equal derivation.classifierId, but sample YAMLs use strategy-fingerprint-classifier/target-mix-classifier suffix; violates T008/T015 invariant.
concerns.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-17: verified against shipped build-index.ts - the DEFAULT_CLASSIFIERS registry is keyed by FACET id (def.id = 'script'), NOT by derivation.classifierId. classifierId ('script-classifier') is a free-form freshness/doc label (types.ts:54), never a registry key. The invented 'id === classifierId' invariant was the bug, not the YAML suffix. Fixed data-model Entity 1 + Relationships, contract classifier.contract.md id comment, and tasks T008/T015 to state: registry keyed by facet id; classifierId = <facet>-classifier doc label. Sample YAMLs left as-is (correct).

concerns.note: I2 MEDIUM: FR-008 cited with two meanings - 037 FR-008 = exclude Common/Inherited from denominator (T011), but plan L82, contract C2, T026 cite FR-008 for the value-within-limits/build-fails rule which is 036 FR-008/036 D7.
concerns.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-17: tasks T026 re-cited to '036 FR-008 / 036 D7' for the value-within-limits/build-fails rule, disambiguating from 037 FR-008 (exclude Common/Inherited).

concerns.note: U1 MEDIUM: provenanceTier enum has 3 values but fallback chains list a 4th tier undetermined (Entity 3a says which of four tiers fired); undetermined outcome has no representable provenanceTier and value is unspecified when undetermined.
concerns.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-17: verified against shipped fallback.ts + build-index.ts - 'undetermined' is NOT a 4th provenanceTier. An undetermined outcome carries value:'undetermined' (reserved sentinel in script.yaml limits.values) + confidenceClass:'undetermined', with provenanceTier staying 'default-fallback' (deriveScriptFallback tier 3). The manifest 'undetermined' coverage bucket is keyed off value==='undetermined' (build-index.ts bumpTierCounts), not a tier. Enum keeps 3 values (037 contract already correct). Fixed data-model Entity 3a prose + tasks T014.

concerns.note: D1 HIGH execution risk: 036 harness (build-index.ts, UCD codegen, Entity 2 + facet-index-lint, script.yaml) not on disk/main; Phase 2 depends on it. Mitigated by T001 stub-reconcile but gates implement.
concerns.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-17: 036 harness has LANDED on main (build-index.ts, ucd/generated/scriptLookup.ts, types.ts, fallback.ts, outcome.ts, docs/keyboard-facet-index.json, facet-index-lint wired into pnpm lint, worked-example script-classifier.ts + script.yaml all present on disk). Flipped the tasks blocking-dependency section from 'unimplemented' to 'landed', rewrote T001 (confirm/consume, no stubs), T002/T003 (flat layout, consume shipped UCD - exports scriptOf/scriptExtensionsOf/latinProfileOf, no blockOf), and added a layout-reconciliation note: classifiers live FLAT under utilities/facet-index/ (not a classifiers/ subtree), US1 script classifier is already partly built (extend/tune, don't rebuild; reconcile 0.9/0.5 vs 0.80 confidence thresholds).

concerns.note: P2 follow-ups (non-blocking): extract shared kmn-header-scan helper (parseKmnHeaderStores vs target-mix readKmnTargets); migrate classifiedDefsDir() tests to onlyClassifiedFacets; add onlyClassifiedFacets regression test; conditional notes for strategy-fingerprint; shared CONFIDENT_DOMINANT_SHARE constant. Plus deferred T012 base-layout fall-through + T010 leak-edge fixture (script still 97.3% content tier).

tasks.summary: Regenerated/reconciled tasks.md: 28 tasks across 6 phases (Setup, Foundational, US1 script, US2 strategy-fingerprint, US3 target-mix, Polish). Tests-first per FR-006. Fixed analyze concern I2 (T026 FR-008 mis-citation -> 036 FR-008/D7) and flagged U1 (undetermined provenanceTier reconciliation) in T014.

decisions.decision: Shipped committed index is built with --classified-only (scoped to facets that have a registered classifier: script, strategy-fingerprint, target-mix). Default full build still fails loud on 039 classifier-less defs (intentional guard preserved). Reproducible via the documented flag.

T012 (desktop base-layout fall-through, FR-007 amendment) + the base-layout leak-edge sub-case of T010 EXCISED to new spec 040-desktop-base-layout-fallthrough (scope stub created). Rationale: base-layout fall-through is a Keyman Desktop-only concern requiring deeper desktop-processor modeling (base-layout resolution + [K_x]>nul blocking idiom); touch layouts are explicit JSON (no fall-through) and mobile assumes QWERTY with no per-keyboard base-layout setting. 037 closes on the three-classifier deliverable; script already at 97.3% content-tier without the amendment.
